---
$schema: "../../../../schemas/guardrails.schema.json"
version: "2.0"

# Default Velocity guardrail configuration
# Generated by /init. Adjust thresholds for your team.
# Full schema: schemas/guardrails.schema.json

quality:
  test_coverage_minimum: 80
  tdd_loop_required: true
  documentation_required: true

architecture:
  vertical_slice_required: true
  horizontal_layer_pr_blocked: true
  slice_has_tests_at_all_layers: true
  slice_acceptance_criteria_required: true
  tracer_bullet_first_required: true
  context_window_reset_between_slices: true
  handoff_artifact_required_per_slice: true

domain_language:
  context_md_term_consistency: true
  language_drift_detection: true

security:
  security_review_required: true
  secrets_scan_required: true
  dependency_vulnerability_scan: true

api:
  api_versioning_required: true
  breaking_change_approval_required: true

feedback_loops:
  typecheck_on_every_generated_file: true
  test_after_every_red_green_cycle: true
  lint_before_commit: true

module_architecture:
  deep_module_enforcement: true # enforce during TDD refactor step
  shallow_module_detection: true # flag utils, single-caller extractions, leaking complexity
  context_md_term_consistency: true # validate names against CONTEXT.md during refactor

loop:
  max_attempts: 3 # attempts per task before pausing for human review
  require_approval_for_all: false # true = pause before every task regardless of risk
  pause_on_validation_failure: false # true = pause on any validation error, not just max attempts
  auto_remediate_term_drift: true # auto-fix CONTEXT.md term violations during validate
  auto_remediate_missing_tests: true # auto-add test stubs for source files missing test coverage
  pr_per_task: true # open one PR per task (false = one PR for the full loop run)
  risk_signals: # additional risk patterns beyond built-in high-risk signals
    - pattern: ".*payment.*"
      level: high
    - pattern: ".*auth.*"
      level: high
    - pattern: ".*secret.*"
      level: high
    - pattern: ".*migration.*"
      level: high

governance:
  audit:
    enabled: true
    retention_days: 365
    archive_after_days: 30
    required_events:
      - guardrail.override
      - guardrail.block
      - approval.requested
      - approval.granted
      - approval.rejected
      - validate.result
      - loop.task.complete
      - loop.task.paused

  approval:
    timeout_hours: 8
    require_comment: true
    pr_review_mode: false # true = use GitHub PR reviews instead of in-session approval

  risk_scoring:
    enabled: true
    approval_threshold: 50 # risk score >= this triggers approval workflow
    compliance_review_threshold: 75 # risk score >= this also requires compliance review
    medium_warn_threshold: 25 # risk score >= this shows a warning

  compliance_packs:
    active: [] # Add to activate: ["soc2", "hipaa", "pci-dss", "iso27001"]
    # Compliance pack definitions: .velocity/governance/compliance-packs/
    # Enterprise controls: .velocity/governance/enterprise-controls.md

pre_tool_use_hooks:
  - event: PreToolUse
    tool: Bash
    pattern: "git push --force(?! *--force-with-lease)"
    action: block
    message: "Force push blocked by Velocity guardrail. Use --force-with-lease instead."

  - event: PreToolUse
    tool: Bash
    pattern: "git reset --hard"
    action: block
    message: "Hard reset blocked. Stash or commit your changes first."

  - event: PreToolUse
    tool: Bash
    pattern: "git commit.*-m.*main|git commit.*-m.*master"
    action: warn
    message: "Committing directly to main/master. Create a branch and open a PR instead."

  - event: PreToolUse
    tool: Bash
    pattern: "rm -rf (?!node_modules|dist|build|.next|__pycache__|target)"
    action: warn
    message: "Destructive rm -rf detected. Confirm this is intentional."

  - event: PreToolUse
    tool: Bash
    pattern: "drop table|DROP TABLE"
    action: block
    message: "DROP TABLE blocked. Use a migration with a reversible down step."

  - event: PreToolUse
    tool: Bash
    pattern: "delete from|DELETE FROM"
    action: warn
    message: "DELETE without WHERE detected. Confirm this is not a bulk delete."
---
